name: Curoso Plumbing Inc.
tagline: Trusted plumbing & water heater experts in Santa Rosa, CA, and surrounding areas—licensed, 35+ years
seoDescription: Trusted plumbing & water heater experts in Santa Rosa, CA, and surrounding areas—licensed, 35+ years of experience. Call for the best emergency service company.

sections.heading: Honest plumbing across Santa Rosa, CA
sections.subheading: Curoso Plumbing is fully licensed, bonded, insured, and operated by Jim Curoso. Jim was raised in Santa Rosa and attended Santa Rosa High School where he was a three-sport letterman

sections.heading: About Curoso Plumbing Inc.
body: Curoso Plumbing is fully licensed, bonded, insured, and operated by Jim Curoso. Jim was raised in Santa Rosa and attended Santa Rosa High School where he was a three-sport letterman. He also has a Master’s Degree in Education. His three children, Jordan, James, and Dante are his pride and joy. His father, Jim Curoso Sr, started plumbing in the Navy. Jim’s family has been serving customers in the North Bay for over 40 years.
If you are in need of water heater services, Curoso Plumbing is here to help. We can provide you with a wide range of services, from repairs to installations and replacements.
